checkpoint.label: r7-3-9-config1-sprout-v2-success-20260513
checkpoint.description: Invalidated sprout V2 checkpoint: R7-3.8 diffuse bake remains valid, but R7-3.9 current-view reflection blocked the diffuse paste and only proved live roughness forcing.

visualAcceptance.roughnessOneObservation: At floor roughness 1, the floor outside the sprout patch has no reflection, so the sprout boundary is expected to look hard.
visualAcceptance.roughnessPointOneObservation: At floor roughness 0.1 and 1 spp, A diffuse is clean, but B and C are noisy like live path tracing; D proves the central patch roughness is forced to 0.1.

abVisualCheck.modeB: same noisy live look as mode C
